title: Scab Vendor: The Life and Times of Jonathan Shaw
original_title: Scab Vendor: The Life and Times of Jonathan Shaw
overview: Born with a silver spoon, Jonathan Shaw chose, at the height of his career as a tattoo artist, to give up on his celebrity lifestyle in order to escape from his own vicious cycle.
